decisions.title: Ship Policy API validation endpoint before broader API release
decisions.context: ENG-9398 highlights need for validate endpoint. Without it, users can't safely test policies before deployment—critical for Build the Moat (API-first strategy).

arguments.for: Prevents customer errors, enables self-service adoption, aligns with API-first strategy for Sift Edge
arguments.against: Delays broader API release by ~2 weeks, adds scope to Q1 deliverables

decisions.title: Commit to DataFusion migration for CSRS (DLv3 schema)
decisions.context: ENG-9493, ENG-9460, ENG-9457, ENG-9456 signal major query engine refactor. This enables Files in CEL (ENG-9406, ENG-9590) and Canvas performance—core to Nail the Core.

arguments.for: Unlocks Python Rules file handling, improves Canvas query speed 3-5x, modernizes parquet reads
arguments.against: High migration risk, diverts 2 engineers for 6+ weeks, potential backward compat issues with DLv2

decisions.title: Prioritize authentication for docs (ENG-7447) or delay indefinitely
decisions.context: Converted to project—signals scope creep. Docs auth enables TEC IdP integration (ENG-8081) but doesn't directly drive North Star (Decisions Captured).

arguments.for: Enables enterprise customers (TEC compliance), supports Embed Deeper via secure docs
arguments.against: Low ROI for decision capture, delays Canvas V2 and Explore V2 polish work

decisions.title: Adopt Checkly for e2e integration testing (ENG-9585)
decisions.context: Current ephemeral env failures (ENG-9546) and chart bugs (ENG-8866, ENG-9589) suggest QA gaps. Checkly eval could strengthen Build the Moat via reliability.

arguments.for: Reduces customer-facing bugs, improves deploy confidence, aligns with quality moat strategy
arguments.against: New tooling adds maintenance overhead, team lacks external monitoring expertise

decisions.title: Address channel selector bugs (ENG-9014, ENG-9522) before Explore V2 GA
decisions.context: Two critical bugs block user workflows in Attributes Assign and Rules. Explore V2 can't ship if core interactions are broken—Nail the Core at risk.
decisions.blockedBy: Root cause analysis incomplete for ENG-9522 asset filter interaction

arguments.for: Prevents GA launch with known critical bugs, protects customer trust
arguments.against: Delays Explore V2 launch window by 1-2 weeks

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy decision-making week: 5 critical decisions, 22 engineering signals triaged, 3 platform migration discussions.
alerts: Focus time below 25% threshold—reschedule 2 status meetings to async
3 consecutive days with <1hr focus blocks—risk to deep work on DataFusion migration
ENG-9522 blocker requires 2hr investigation block by Wed
